title: BestCandidate
description:
Closest near-miss when a fuzzy/exact match fails (v0.1.29 P0-2).

Agents use this to correct `old` without re-reading the full file.

line.description: 1-based line of the candidate start in the file.

similarity.description: Similarity score 0.0–1.0 of the best attempt.

strategy.description: Strategy that produced this candidate score.

text.description: Snippet of the best matching region (truncated to 500 chars).
